name: Pasta Fagioli
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring to a slow boil: 4 cups water, 2 stalks celery (chopped), and 1 teaspoon salt.
2. In a separate pan, sauté 2 garlic cloves in 2-3 tablespoons olive oil.
3. Add the sautéed garlic when it is cool, then stir in 1 can tomato paste.
4. Combine the sauce with the beans and simmer for 15 to 20 minutes.
5. Cook 1/2 box Ditalini macaroni and drain; add to the soup.
